# Autogenerated API Reference Design

**Date:** 2026-04-03
**Scope:** JSDoc annotations + TypeDoc pipeline + API docs rendering in website docs

## Overview

Replace the hardcoded API reference placeholder with a fully autogenerated API reference built from JSDoc annotations in the library source. The TypeDoc script (already exists) extracts structured JSON, and new docs pages render it with the same glass card design. Runs as part of CI so docs stay in sync with code.

## Design Decisions

| Decision | Choice |
|----------|--------|
| Extraction tool | TypeDoc (existing script enhanced) |
| JSDoc coverage | All public API symbols |
| Output format | `api-docs.json` in `content/docs-v2/api/` |
| Rendering | Server component reading JSON at build time |
| Old `/api-reference` page | Removed (already done) |
| Nav link | Points to `/docs/api/angular` (already done) |
| CI integration | `generate-api-docs` step before `nx build website` |

## JSDoc Coverage

Add JSDoc to every public symbol in `libs/angular/src/`:

| File | Symbols to Document |
|------|-------------------|
| `angular.fn.ts` | `agent()` function |
| `angular.provider.ts` | `provideAgent()`, `AgentConfig` |
| `angular.types.ts` | `AgentOptions`, `AgentRef`, `StreamEvent`, `SubagentStreamRef` |
| `transport/fetch-stream.transport.ts` | `FetchStreamTransport` class, constructor, methods |
| `transport/mock-stream.transport.ts` | `MockAgentTransport` class, `script()`, `step()`, `reset()` |

Each symbol gets: one-line summary, `@param` for parameters, `@returns`, `@example`.

## TypeDoc Pipeline

**Script:** `apps/website/scripts/generate-api-docs.ts` (enhance existing)

**Input:** `libs/angular/src/public-api.ts`

**Output:** `apps/website/content/docs-v2/api/api-docs.json`

**JSON shape:**
```typescript
interface ApiDocEntry {
  name: string;
  kind: 'function' | 'class' | 'interface' | 'type';
  description: string;
  signature?: string;
  params?: { name: string; type: string; description: string; optional?: boolean; default?: string }[];
  returns?: { type: string; description: string };
  examples?: string[];
  properties?: { name: string; type: string; description: string; optional?: boolean }[];
  methods?: { name: string; signature: string; description: string; params?: ApiDocEntry['params']; returns?: ApiDocEntry['returns'] }[];
}
```

## Rendering

**Component:** `apps/website/src/components/docs/ApiDocRenderer.tsx`

Server component that reads `api-docs.json` and renders each entry as a glass card with:
- Function/class name in monospace accent color
- Kind badge (function/class/interface)
- Description
- Signature in dark code block
- Parameters table
- Return type
- Code examples in dark blocks
- Properties table (for interfaces)
- Methods section (for classes)

Same visual design as the current `ApiRefTable` component but with richer content from TypeDoc.

**Pages:** 4 MDX files in `content/docs-v2/api/` that import and render from the JSON:
- `angular.mdx`
- `provide-angular.mdx`
- `fetch-stream-transport.mdx`
- `mock-stream-transport.mdx`

## CI Integration

Add `npm run generate-api-docs` before the website build step in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`. The generated JSON is committed to the repo (not gitignored) so local dev works without running the script.

## Files to Create/Modify

**Create:**
- `apps/website/src/components/docs/ApiDocRenderer.tsx` ŌĆö rendering component

**Modify:**
- `libs/angular/src/lib/angular.fn.ts` ŌĆö add JSDoc
- `libs/angular/src/lib/angular.provider.ts` ŌĆö add JSDoc
- `libs/angular/src/lib/angular.types.ts` ŌĆö add JSDoc
- `libs/angular/src/lib/transport/fetch-stream.transport.ts` ŌĆö add JSDoc
- `libs/angular/src/lib/transport/mock-stream.transport.ts` ŌĆö add JSDoc
- `apps/website/scripts/generate-api-docs.ts` ŌĆö enhance output format
- `apps/website/content/docs-v2/api/angular.mdx` ŌĆö replace placeholder

- `apps/website/content/docs-v2/api/fetch-stream-transport.mdx` ŌĆö new

- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` ŌĆö add generate-api-docs step

## Verification

- Run `npm run generate-api-docs` ŌĆö verify `api-docs.json` is generated with all entries
- Open http://localhost:3000/docs/api/angular ŌĆö verify rich API docs render
- Navigate through all 4 API pages ŌĆö verify content matches JSDoc
- Run `npx nx build website` ŌĆö verify build passes
- Modify a JSDoc comment, re-run script ŌĆö verify JSON updates
